name: Tree of Forbidden Knowledge
oracleText:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may draw a card. If you do, you lose 1 life.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, each opponent loses 1 life.
flavorText: "Of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it." — Genesis 2:17
notes: Early World symbolic object card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for a Tree of Knowledge detail from Cranach's Adam and Eve-Paradise.
